Thanks for taking the time to improve All Knighters Manager!
Fill out the sections below to help a reviewer land your change quickly.

-->

## 📌 What does this PR do?

<!-- One-paragraph summary of the goal and the change. Reference any related
issue numbers using GitHub's linking syntax — `closes #123`, `refs #456`. -->

## 🧪 Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply — leave the rest untouched. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (would require existing users to take action)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation / README change
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor or cleanup (no functional change)
- [ ] ⚙️ CI / build tooling change

## ✅ Self-checks

<!-- Pre-PR checks you've completed. Skip any that genuinely don't apply. -->

- [ ] `flutter analyze` reports no issues
- [ ] `flutter test` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added or updated where applicable
- [ ] Manually verified on at least one platform: <!-- `flutter run -d chrome` / `-d android` / `-d ios` / ... -->
- [ ] Relevant docs updated (README, inline comments) — only if applicable

## 📸 Screenshots / logs
